choose.when: AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT Rpt WHERE Rpt.RPT_CMNT_NO = c.CMNT_NO AND Rpt.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') < 5
AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT Rpt WHERE Rpt.RPT_CMNT_NO = c.CMNT_NO AND Rpt.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') >= 5

mapper.select:
SELECT c.CMNT_NO AS cmntNo,
c.CMNT_COMM_NO AS commNo,
post.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle,
c.CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, c.CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent, DATE_FORMAT(c.CMNT_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS cmntRegDate, c.CMNT_USE_YN AS cmntUseYn, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS nickname FROM COMMENT c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID
JOIN COMMUNITY post ON c.CMNT_COMM_NO = post.COMM_NO
WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY c.CMNT_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID WHERE 1=1
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENT SET CMNT_USE_YN = #{useYn}, CMNT_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmtNo}
UPDATE COMMENT SET CMNT_USE_YN = #{useYn}, CMNT_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CMNT_COMM_NO FROM COMMENT WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_CMNT_CNT = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT WHERE CMNT_COMM_NO = #{commNo} AND CMNT_USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
mapper.select: SELECT c.CMNT_NO AS cmntNo, c.CMNT_COMM_NO AS cmntCommNo, c.CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, c.CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent, c.CMNT_REG_DATE AS cmntRegDate, c.CMNT_UP_DATE AS cmntUpDate, c.CMNT_USE_YN AS cmntUseYn, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname FROM `COMMENT` c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.CMNT_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID WHERE c.CMNT_COMM_NO = #{commNo} AND c.CMNT_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.CMNT_REG_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `COMMENT` ( CMNT_COMM_NO, CMNT_MBR_ID, CMNT_CONTENT, CMNT_REG_DATE, CMNT_USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmntCommNo}, #{cmntMbrId}, #{cmntContent}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE `COMMENT` SET CMNT_CONTENT = #{cmntContent}, CMNT_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CMNT_NO AS cmntNo, CMNT_COMM_NO AS cmntCommNo, CMNT_MBR_ID AS cmntMbrId, CMNT_CONTENT AS cmntContent FROM `COMMENT` WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_CMNT_CNT = CASE WHEN COMM_CMNT_CNT > 0 THEN COMM_CMNT_CNT - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
